q: What days does happy hour run at Louisiana Purchase?
a: Happy Hour runs Monday – Friday, 3 PM – 5 PM. Louisiana Purchase is open seven days a week — Monday 3 PM – 9 PM, Tuesday 3 PM – 9 PM, Wednesday 3 PM – 9 PM, Thursday 3 PM – 9 PM, Friday 12 PM – 12 AM, Saturday 12 PM – 10 PM, Sunday 12 PM – 8 PM.
